title: helia obtusifolia
intro: Helia obtusifolia, also known as the Wild Dagga or Leonotis, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Helia obtusifolia include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used in traditional African medicine to treat a range of ailments.
